title: Radiant
description: This mod aims to integrate Minecraft into the Cosmere universe and add the Radiant Orders from the Stormlight Archive series by Brandon Sanderson
body:
Minecraft Mod based on the Stormlight Archive by Brandon Sanderson. This mod is a fan made project to bring the knights radiants from the works of fiction of Brandon Sanderson to minecraft. The mod contains **SPOILERS** up to **Wind and Truth**.


# **Help Wanted**

I feel that the artistic side of the mod could be much better. I’ve done what I could, but let’s be kind and say it’s not exactly my strong suit. If you think you can improve any of the current textures or models in the mod, open a GitHub issue and let’s see what we can do. I’d be especially interested in improving the model for the Cultivationspren or the Shardplates.

# **FAQ**
## Is the mod multiplayer-friendly?
The mod is intended to be multiplayer friendly but hasn't been properly tested yet. If you found any problems please report it.
## Will you backport the mod to an older version?
No, this mod is made with Mcreator and the tool only supports two versions at a time so its imposible for me to backport it.
## Will you add new content?
Yes, I want to add the new knowledge learned in Wind and Truth or the Cosmere RPG when its released in July, now we know more about some surges than when I started the project.
## When are you gonna update to a new version?
As said previously this mod is made with Mcreator so until the tool updates to a newer version I cannot make anything, the good thing is that once this happens it is extremly easy to update the mod.
## Where is the fifth Ideal?
We currently know next to nothing of the Fith Oath what it does (and the rpg isn't going to add any new information) so until we know more about it expect the Bondsmith treatment, not planned.
## Future Content

- Banner Patterns for each Radiant Order
- Gems in Metal Cages
- Naming your Spren
- Investiture use changing depending on your Oaths progression
- More aluminum funcionality
